---
title: "Growth_Data_Exploration"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
#library(gtools) #testing #unneeded

```

## Data

Each data pathway is different, so upload the data from your computer 

```{r}
#View(ToxGrowth)
```

```{r}
unique(ToxGrowth$Species)
```

```{r}
ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Lampsilis siliquoidea") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

# above species tested twice (two different years)

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Villosa iris") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Hyalella azteca") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Pimephales promelas") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Oncorhynchus mykiss") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

# above species tested twice (two different years)

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Chironomus dilutus") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 


```

```{r}
ToxGrowth$Tox_conc=as.character(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
ToxGrowth$Tox_conc=as.numeric(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
class(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc2)
ToxGrowth$Tox_conc1=str_sort(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc, numeric = TRUE) #pissing me off
print(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
print(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc1)

Rainbowmussel=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Villosa iris")

Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc3 = factor(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc , levels=c(20, 228, 392, 713, 1462, 3000)) #also pissing me off # i forgot a comma

Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc2=mixedsort(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc) #not doing what i want

Rainbowmussel %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc3, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

boxplot(Rainbowmussel$Dry_rep_wt ~ Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc3)
```
```{r}

Fatmucket=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Lampsilis siliquoidea")   #come back to
unique(Fatmucket$Tox_conc)
Fatmucket$Tox_conc = factor(Fatmucket$Tox_conc, levels = c())

Rainbowmussel=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Villosa iris")
unique(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc)
Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc = factor(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc , levels=c(20, 228, 392, 713, 1462, 3000))

Scuds=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Hyalella azteca")
unique(Scuds$Tox_conc)
Scuds$Tox_conc = factor(Scuds$Tox_conc, levels = c(54, 171, 292, 532, 1014, 1990))

Fatheadminnow=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Pimephales promelas")
unique(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc = factor(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc, levels = c(17.5, 224.3, 370.9, 765.7, 1566.9, 3032.4))

Rainbowtrout=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Oncorhynchus mykiss")   #come back to
unique(Rainbowtrout$Tox_conc)
Rainbowtrout$Tox_conc = factor(Rainbowtrout$Tox_conc, levels = c())

Midge=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Chironomus dilutus")
unique(Midge$Tox_conc)
Midge$Tox_conc = factor(Midge$Tox_conc, levels = c(0.2, 5.7, 11, 21.2, 44.7, 96.6))
```

```{r}
Fatmucket %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 
 # facet_wrap(~Year)

# above species tested twice (two different years)

Rainbowmussel %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 


Scuds %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

Fatheadminnow %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

Rainbowtrout %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

# above species tested twice (two different years)

Midge %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 


```


```{r}
head(Fatmucket)

as.numeric(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatheadminnow)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

fhm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
fhm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)


head(Rainbowmussel)

as.numeric(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatheadminnow)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

fhm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
fhm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)


head(Scuds)

as.numeric(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatheadminnow)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

fhm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
fhm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)


head(Fatheadminnow)

as.numeric(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatheadminnow)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

fhm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
fhm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)


head(Rainbowtrout)

as.numeric(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatheadminnow)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

fhm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
fhm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)


head(Midge)

as.numeric(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatheadminnow)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

fhm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
fhm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)


#saving for future maybe
head(Fatheadminnow)

as.numeric(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatheadminnow)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

fhm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
fhm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)


head(Fatheadminnow)

as.numeric(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatheadminnow)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

fhm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
fhm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)
```
